title: Commission welcomes political agreement to simplify rules for the chemicals sector

title: The 2026 EQAVET Annual Network meeting
content: The EQAVET Annual Network meetings gather EU quality assurance representatives in VET, National Reference Points, EU bodies staff members and experts. Attendees included 54 participants from 33 countries (25 EU Member States and 8 non-EU countries).

title: Commission strengthens migration management along the Channel route

title: Seagrass power: how nature is healing a polluted lagoon
content: In Portugal’s Ria de Aveiro lagoon, the once-thriving Largo do Laranjo was a vibrant underwater meadow carpeted in Zostera noltei seagrass. But decades of industrial pollution left mercury and arsenic into the waters, poisoning the sediments and wiping out the underwater greenery.

title: Mediterranean Algae: restoring ports and coastal waters with BlueInvest
content: Mediterranean Algae, a Spanish company tackles nutrient pollution in ports and coastal waters. Its system uses algae to clean seawater. It also provides reliable real-time data on water quality. This helps ports meet EU requirements and reduce their environmental impact.

title: Europe's bathing waters remain safe to swim
content: The vast majority met the EU's ‘excellent' bathing quality standards in 2025, according to a new European Environment Agency report.
snippet: The vast majority met the EU's ‘excellent' bathing quality standards in 2025, according to a new European Environment Agency report.

title: In focus: Improving the energy performance of buildings

title: EU and Ukraine open first accession negotiations cluster

title: EU and Montenegro close accession negotiations on freedom of movement of workers and consumer and health protection

title: Commission approves Holcim's acquisition of Xella, subject to conditions

title: New migration and asylum rules enter into application: what is changing?

title: Electric car sales surge as high oil prices drive shift away from fossil fuels
